title: AdSense Low-Value Content Recovery — Final Report
status: IN_PROGRESS — first fix cycle deployed, more needed

rejection_summary.root_cause: Combination of: unprovable trust claims on homepage, placeholder content on /data, contradictory 'no ads' claims while running Adsterra, missing Methodology from navigation, thin AI Specialist page in primary nav, large thin blog footprint (125 zero-impression guides)

fixes_applied: Homepage: Removed 'Used by thousands monthly' → 'Free tools for everyday financial decisions'
Homepage: Removed 'Featured in AI Overviews' pill entirely
Homepage: Removed '4.9 ★ — rated by users' pill entirely
Homepage: 'No trackers, no ads, no data selling' → 'data stays on your device... We never sell your personal data'
/data: Removed 'Coming soon' and 'Planned Data Sections' placeholder content
Footer: Added Methodology link to Company section
About: 'no ads that compromise UX' → 'minimal, non-intrusive advertising'
fixes_remaining: Header nav: Remove or de-emphasize Sign In/Get Started
Header nav: Remove AI Specialist from primary nav OR add substantial public content
Audit remaining 7 money calculators against template
Privacy Policy: Add ad partner disclosures
Address 125 thin blog guides (Phase 32 Day 7 decision)
reason: Score 66/100 (projected 75 after deploy). Must reach 90+ with 0 critical issues. Do NOT request review yet.
next_cycle_recommendations: Fix Editorial Policy (AI disclosure + corrections policy) — 30 min
Remove Sign In/Get Started from header nav for AdSense review period — 15 min
Audit and improve remaining 7 money calculators — 2-3 hours
Address thin blog footprint (Phase 32 Day 7 on Jun 25) — coordinated
Run second readiness scorecard after fixes
Request review ONLY when score ≥ 90 and 0 critical issues

success_metrics.goal: Transform QFINHUB from 'Low value content' rejection into review-ready site
success_metrics.progress: Phase 34 Cycle 1 complete — 6 of 14 fixes applied
success_metrics.critical_path: Editorial Policy + nav cleanup + calculator audits → score ≥ 90
